title: hutchinsia alpina subsp. font-queri
intro: Hutchinsia alpina subsp. font-queri, also known as Font Quer's Hutchinsia, is a rare alpine plant species that belongs to the family Primulaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which are said to help with respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing sore throats, and acting as a natural expectorant to aid in the relief of congestion. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or tincture, and it can also be used in herbal teas or infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
